title: Natural Decor Mod
description: Adds many plants, few biomes and many decorative blocks to Minecraft
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/GSYWylQ.png)

Welcome to Natural Decor Mod! This mod adds tons of decorations, plants, as well as 5 biomes and a few mobs to your game! Most of the vanilla biomes will have unique bushes, flowers, small trees and more spawn in the overworld. Decorations like pravement blocks, planter pots, wind spinners & pinwheels, outdoor iron, and much more!!! 3 new woodtypes are Juniper Trees, Saguaro Cactus & Araucaria Trees!

New Landscaper Villager profession! Their profession block are Lawn Flamingos!

Additionally in the 1.20.1 & 1.21.1 versions of the mod plants from the Spring to Life Update has been backported. (These can be disabeled from spawning in settings.)

You can enable or disable certain features in the mod's config folder to customize what plants and structures you don't want spawning in the world!

Biomes Included in the mod are:
- Marshy Wetland
- Wooded Basalt Cliffs
- Scrubland
- Saguaro Desert
- Grassy Coastal Dunes

(Versions of the mod without natural biomes spawning usually labeled as betas, while release versions will have biomes included!)

Mobs Include:
- Beagle: stray dogs spawn in various biomes like birch forests, wooded badlands, sunflower plains, old taigas and more. They can be tamed with botany biscuits!
- Botany Beagle: A NPC that spawns in his own house structure that can be bartered with Botany Biscuits! He can give you various look including tools and exclusive plants!
- Bluegill: Fish that spawns in swamps, mangroves and rivers! Can be cooked!
- Carp: A fish that spawns in rivers & swamps. Can be cooked!
- Koi: A fish that spawns in pools of water in Cherry Grove Biomes!

If you are using biome mods like Enviromental and similar ones and if modpack is crashing while loading, it's due to a bug with how the the game itself fails to load biomes with similar IDs. You will need [Feature Recycler Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/feature-recycler) and it will fix the crash and work as normal! :)


There is a bug with biome generation and Terrablender Im trying to fix! But some biomes may be bugged out.


![Example of plant terrain gen!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4458d72dfc02bbfa821dc0223ef54617320cc76e.png)
